case_title: CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP. VS. KATHRYN C MCGEORGE

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-24-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE FEB-13-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
